title: Silver Acacia Wood
description: Changes Acacia to silvery gray for aesthetic purposes.
body:
## Bored with the bright orange color?

## Don't like Orange Wood?

## Want a more aesthetically pleasing look?


This pack Changes **ALL** Acacia-related items into a beautiful Silvery-grey color.

![Image](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com//data/9d72SRUz/images/4fedda84c3fc90735349a80009ae9eca073d0d34.png)
